gmcm_lookup_more_tooltip: See more information about what is under your cursor within the Navegador del Mundo menu
gmcm_describe_guidance_tooltip: Display a notification that briefly describes the current guidance
gmcm_focus_more_tooltip: A controller will snap to more elements in the Navegador del Mundo menu
gmcm_other_options: There are additional in game options available within the Navegador del Mundo menu itself.
open_wn_with_keybind: Open Navegador del Mundo with the keybind: {{keybindString}}
Scrap_Paper_Description: It has some directions written on it.
attempting_to_find_directions: Attempting to find directions from {{start}} to {{destination}}...
attempting_to_find_directions_coordinate: Attempting to find directions from {{start}} to {{destination}} {{coordinates}}...
current_tile_is_not_reachable1: Your current tile {{tile}} seems to be not walkable in typical gameplay.
current_tile_is_not_reachable2: If you think it should be considered walkable, please report this to the mod author.
current_tile_is_not_reachable3: You may move to another tile on the map and try again.
no_default_arrival_tile1: Note: The location {{name}} has no DefaultArrivalTile.
no_default_arrival_tile2: Since the player is not in that location, the mod will select an arrival tile.
no_default_arrival_tile3: Note: this tile could be in an unexpected or even isolated part of the map.
no_remote_starting_tile1: Unable to find an appropriate starting tile on which a player can walk.
no_remote_starting_tile2: You may try the search again or for a likely better outcome, go to the location itself and stand on a walkable tile.
no_route_found1: \n--- No route was found to travel from {{locationName1}} {{coordinates}} to {{locationName2}}{{optionalCoordinate}} via available methods of travel.
no_route_found2: If you believe this is incorrect, please share this with the mod author.
no_route_found3: Follow the instructions at https://smapi.io/log/ and share the result with your report to the mod author.
data_logged: Data has been added to your SMAPI log. You may upload your log to https://smapi.io/log/ and follow the steps on that page to share it.
go_direction_leave_small_map_and_go_with: In {{locationName1}} go {{distance}} tiles {{direction1}} and then go {{direction2}} to {{locationName2}}.
go_direction_across_medium_map_and_go_wi: Go {{distance}} tiles {{direction1}} across {{locationName1}} and then go {{direction2}} to {{locationName2}}.
go_short_distance_and_go_with_distance: In {{locationName1}} go {{distance}} tiles {{direction1}} and then go {{direction2}} to {{locationName2}}.
go_direction_and_leave_building_with_dis: Go {{distance}} tiles {{direction}} in {{locationName1}} and exit to {{locationName2}}.
go_to_entrance_with_distance: In {{locationName1}} go {{distance}} tiles {{direction}} to the entrance to {{locationName2}}.
go_direction_leave_small_map_and_go: In {{locationName1}} go {{direction1}} and then go {{direction2}} to {{locationName2}}.
go_direction_across_medium_map_and_go: Go {{direction1}} across {{locationName1}} and then go {{direction2}} to {{locationName2}}.
go_short_distance_and_go: In {{locationName1}} go {{direction1}} and then go {{direction2}} to {{locationName2}}.
go_to_entrance: In {{locationName1}} go {{direction}} to the entrance to {{locationName2}}.
reason_edge_unusable_festival: There is a festival today so {{locationName}} is unavailable.
reason_edge_unusable_beforeopen: The door to {{locationName}} is locked until {{time}}.
reason_edge_unusable_friendship: You are not close enough friends with {{nameOfNPC}} to enter {{locationName}}.
reason_edge_unusable_busdriver: A bus driver is unavailable for travel to {{locationName}}
cross_bridge_to_use_navigator: Please walk back across the bridge to use the navigator.
reached_destination: You have arrived at your destination
navigation_ended_tile_failed_walkable_ch: Navigation ended: tile {{tile}} failed walkable check in {{location}}.
navigation_canceled_non_walkable_tile: Player is on a non-walkable tile. The navigator has shut down.
active_navigation_failed_in_location: Active navigation failed in {{location}} from {{tile1}} to {{tile2}}
unable_to_guide_from_this_location: The navigator is unable to guide from this location. Try returning to {{location}}.
navigator_paused_will_resume_later: The navigator cannot function here and has paused. It will resume when it is able to do so.
travel_to_location_requires_specific_til: To travel to {{location}}, you must specify a tile.
tile_not_reachable_provide_a_different_o: The tile {{tile}} in {{location}} is not reachable. Please provide a different tile.
navigation_canceled_unable_to_reach_tile: Navigation has been canceled. You are unable to get to the tile ({{X}}, {{Y}}) in {{location}}.
no_route_there_now: The navigator could not find a route to there right now.
no_route_there_now_specific_location: The navigator could not find a route to {{locationName}} right now.
navigation_canceled_npc_no_longer_in_loc: Navigation canceled: {{nameOfNPC}} is no longer in {{locationName}}
nagivation_canceled_npc_unreachable_mayb: Navigation canceled: {{nameOfNPC}} is unreachable (and possibly going to the void).
navigation_aborting_for_lag: Active navigation is having difficulty around here - aborting as a precautionary measure.
navigation_aborted_error: An internal error occurred. Shutting down navigator.
recalculating_route_unexpected: Something went wrong. Recalculating route using data from {{time}}
event_cannot_play_yet: The event cannot play right now, but may be available later
flood_fill_algorithm_abort: Flood fill algorithm in {{location}} is taking a long time. Aborting the process now.
menu_NPC_tooltip: Go to a villager or other NPC
menu_search_tooltip: Buscar for a location in the world
menu_go_home_tooltip: Begin active guidance to your home location
menu_poi_tooltip: Points of interest added by other mods. Current count: {{count}}
added_new_points_of_interest: Added {{count}} new point(s) of interest to Navegador del Mundo
menu_navigator_currently_location: The navigator is currently guiding you to {{locationName}}.
menu_navigator_currently_section: The navigator is currently guiding you to {{section}} of {{locationName}}.
menu_not_enough_money_notice: Warning: you do not currently have enough money to cover the cost of this route ({{goldPriceString}})
menu_one_time notice_always_log: This is a one time notice! (It will continue to appear in your SMAPI log when appropriate, though)
menu_farmhouse_difficulty_notice: Note: Your route involves the farmhouse. Navegador del Mundo may have difficulty navigating within the farmhouse, particularly if you use a custom farmhouse mod.\n\nThis notice can be disabled in the Opciones section of the Navegador del Mundo menu.
menu_farmhouse_difficulty_notice_shorten: Note: the navigator may have difficulty guiding you in the farmhouse.
menu_search_interrupts_active_navigation: Warning: the navigator is currently active - if you perform a search in this menu, the navigator will end its current active nagivation task so that the search can provide accurate results.
menu_waiting: Type a search for a location above. You are currently in the location {{location}}. Buscar results will only include locations you can get to right now.
menu_may_take_seconds: Please wait, this may take a few seconds
menu_processing: Checking possible routes... Total potential results based on name matches: {{number}}
menu_guide_button_tooltip: Start active guidance to {{locationName}} using the navigator
menu_scrap_button_tooltip: Write directions to {{locationName}} on a piece of scrap paper
menu_guide_button_tooltip_meet_npc: Start active guidance to {{locationName}} using the navigator to meet {{nameOfNPC}}
menu_scrap_button_tooltip_meet_npc: Write directions to {{locationName}} on a piece of scrap paper to meet {{nameOfNPC}}
menu_higher_y: Y values increase to the south
menu_higher_x: X values increase to the east
menu_map_not_clickable: Tick the checkbox on the right to make the map clickable
menu_quest_specialorder: This quest has a drop box in {{locationName}}. The navigator can guide you to the drop box.
menu_quest_location: This quest requires that you visit {{locationName}}. The navigator can guide you to there.
menu_quest_itemdelivery: This quest requires that you give an item to {{nameOfNPC}}. Use the NPC submenu for guidance to an NPC.
menu_quest_lostitem: This quest requires that you find a lost item. The navigator can guide you to the item. Use the NPC submenu for guidance to {{nameOfNPC}}.
menu_quest_no_quests: You have no quests that Navegador del Mundo can help with
menu_npc_all_tooltip: This will include in the list non-social NPCs as well as NPCs that do not appear in the Social tab of the game's menu until you meet them.
menu_npc_all_reminder: Can't find an NPC? Try the \"{{menu_npc_all_value}}\" checkbox above
menu_npc_please_filter_message: To view NPCs that you have not favorited, please type into the filter above to limit the current count of NPCs to {{maxCount}}. It is currently {{count}}. See the Opciones menu to change the threshold.
menu_npc_currently_in_but_will_go: {{nameOfNPC}} is in {{locationName1}} but at {{time}} {{nameOfNPC}} will start going to {{locationName2}}.
menu_npc_currently_in_but_on_the_way: {{nameOfNPC}} is currently in {{locationName1}} but is on the way to {{locationName2}}.
menu_npc_is_in_for_a_while: {{nameOfNPC}} is in {{locationName}} for the next few hours.
menu_npc_unable_to_enter_NPC_room: Note that you are unable to enter {{nameOfNPC}}'s room.
menu_npc_unable_to_enter_NPC_and_NPC_roo: Note that you are unable to enter {{nameOfNPC1}} and {{nameOfNPC2}}'s room.
menu_npc_where_meet: Would you like to try to meet {{nameOfNPC}} in {{locationName}}?
menu_npc_where_meet2: Would you like to try to meet {{nameOfNPC}} in {{locationName1}} or {{locationName2}}?
menu_npc_where_meet_unavailable: It seems like you are unable to meet {{nameOfNPC}} soon. Perhaps you can try again later.
menu_npc_go_anyway: Would you like to go there anyway?
menu_npc_go_there_or: You may go to {{locationName1}} anyway or go to {{locationName2}}.
menu_npc_socialize_quests: Talk to {{nameOfNPC}} to advance the {{questName}} quest.
menu_npc_not_talked_to_tooltip: You have not talked to {{nameOfNPC}} today
menu_npc_greet_missing_notice: There are {{number}} NPC(s) who could not be found for the socialize/Introductions quest. Did you uninstall a mod? Missing NPCs: {{list}}
menu_events_include_soon_events_tooltip: Only include events available now or in the next hour
menu_events_filter_tooltip: Filter events based on NPCs with friendship requirements, NPCs who must be present, or location
menu_options_note_save_file: Note: unless otherwise noted, options set on this page are saved to your save file, not to a config.json
menu_options_set_home_location_tooltip: Set your home location in the navigator to here
menu_options_reset_home_location_tooltip: Reset your home location in the navigator to the front of your farmhouse (or cabin)
menu_options_show_farmhouse_route_notice: When a route involves travel to within (but not from) the farmhouse, show a notice about issues that may occur
menu_options_use_money: Allow money to be spent in routes
menu_options_use_money_tooltip: When unchecked, any form of travel that uses money will be ignored when creating routes
menu_options_avoid_zuzu_traffic: Try to avoid traffic in Downtown Zuzu
menu_options_avoid_zuzu_traffic_tooltip: The navigator will try to keep you on the northern sidewalks (does not update immediately)
menu_options_check_restrictions_descript: These options may be useful for example if you have a mod that changes these restrictions and the navigator cannot detect those changes
menu_options_check_restrictions_money_to: If checked, the navigator will check if you have enough money to use a form of travel
menu_options_check_restrictions_doors_to: If checked, the navigator will check the time and friendship restrictions of locked doors (these are different from bedroom doors)
menu_options_check_restrictions_bus_time: If checked, the navigator will check the time restrictions of the bus today
menu_options_color_walkable: Color of walkable tiles in search menu:
menu_options_color_not_walkable: Color of not walkable tiles in search menu:
menu_options_npc_menu_maximum_count_tool: Setting this too high can cause mouse movement in the NPC menu to lag
menu_options_sort_npc_alphabetical_toolt: NPCs will be sorted by name and not by friendship
menu_options_keybind_header: Tecla rápidas to open the menu:
menu_options_keybind_lookup_more: Tecla rápidas for lookup more feature:
menu_options_keybind_describe_guidance: Tecla rápidas to describe current guidance task:
menu_options_keybind_note: The keybinds below are saved to a config.json file in this mod's folder and not to your save file. Click the keybind to set it.
menu_options_keybind_not_set_note: Click below and then enter a keybind when the prompt opens
menu_options_report_bug: Need to report a bug or other issue? Enter \"worldnav log\" into the SMAPI console window and explain to the mod author what happened.
menu_options_option_change_requires_canc: You have changed options that may affect how you are able to move around the world, but the navigator's current data does not include those potential changes. You must cancel (not recalculate) your current guidance task (click {{buttonText}}) so the navigator can respect your latest options.
scrap_doodle_description_fish: A doodle of a fish with air bubbles above it
scrap_doodle_description_treesky: A doodle of two evergreen trees with small blue particles above like rain
scrap_doodle_description_city: A doodle of a view above a few skyscrapers with the moon in the background
scrap_doodle_description_hilltop: A doodle of a hilltop with a few small, leafy trees on it
scrap_doodle_description_barrentree: A doodle of a barren tree with no leaves
scrap_doodle_description_palmtree: A doodle of a palm tree
scrap_doodle_description_shadowguy: A doodle of a shadow figure similar to Krobus
descriptive_quest_name_expander: {{questName}}. Click to expand to read quest description below and add navigator buttons to the right.
descriptive_enter_text_location_search: Enter text here to search for a location
descriptive_search_name_result: {{locationName}}. Click to display directions below and add navigator buttons to the right.
descriptive_map_grid_image: A map of the location {{locationName}}. A specific tile can be selected by clicking the checkbox and using the buttons and sliders to the right.
descriptive_secret_image_partial_descrip: An image related to the secret
descriptive_time_condition_passed: It is currently within the event's time condition
descriptive_time_condition_failed: The event's time condition is not currently met
descriptive_npc_condition_failed: One or more NPCs are not in the location for the event
descriptive_select_event: {{locationName}}. Click to select the event and add navigator buttons to the right.
descriptive_set_walkable_color: Set the color of walkable tiles in the search menu map. Select the color to the left.
descriptive_set_not_walkable_color: Set the color of not walkable tiles in the search menu map. Select the color to the left.
descriptive_reset_walkable_color: Reset color of walkable tiles in the search menu map
descriptive_reset_not_walkable_color: Reset color of not walkable tiles in the search menu map
descriptive_poi_category_expander: {{poiCategoryName}}. Click to expand to display points of interest below for this category.
descriptive_poi_select: {{poiElement}}. Click to select this point of interest and add navigator buttons to the right.
descriptive_guidance_local: Move {{countLocal}} tiles {{direction}}. The next location is in about {{countEnd}} tiles
descriptive_guidance_local_to_destinatio: Move {{countLocal}} tiles {{direction}}. Your destination is in about {{countEnd}} tiles
